svg.text: BetaTickets — Movie Ticket Booking System — Customer Workflows
Displays: poster, title, rating, overview, genres,
runtime, cast list (12), date selector, recommendations
Max 5 seats per booking | Can't select occupied seats
Booking confirmation email delivered to customer
Each booking shows: poster, title, datetime, amount,
Unpaid bookings show red "Pay Now" link → Stripe URL
Favorites stored in Clerk privateMetadata, not MongoDB
